key_models.project.project: Project header. Inherits: mail.thread, mail.activity.mixin. Key fields: name, privacy_visibility (portal/employees/followers), partner_id, user_id (project manager), date_start, date, stage_id, tag_ids, analytic_account_id, company_id, allow_timesheets, allow_forecast, collaborator_ids.
key_models.project.task: Task. Inherits: mail.thread, mail.activity.mixin. Key fields: name, project_id, user_ids, stage_id, priority, kanban_state (normal/done/blocked), date_deadline, planned_hours, remaining_hours, timesheet_ids, milestone_id, tag_ids, company_id, partner_id.
key_models.project.task.type: Kanban stage. Fields: name, sequence, fold, project_ids, mail_template_id (auto-send on reaching stage), rating_template_id.
key_models.project.collaborator: External/internal collaborator access. Fields: project_id, partner_id, access_level (read/comment/edit).
key_models.project.milestone: Project milestone. Fields: name, project_id, deadline, is_reached, task_ids.
key_models.account.analytic.line: Timesheet/analytic entry. Fields: name, project_id, task_id, employee_id, user_id, unit_amount (hours), date, amount, account_id (analytic account).
key_models.hr.employee: Employee linked to res.users for timesheet attribution. Fields: user_id, timesheet_cost, resource_calendar_id.
key_models.sale.order.line: Sales order line linked to project/task for billing (sale_timesheet). Fields: project_id, task_id, product_id, price_unit.

key_files.project/models/project_project.py: Core project model with visibility, stages, collaborators, and dashboard KPIs
key_files.project/models/project_task.py: Core task model with assignment, stages, kanban state, deadlines, and activities
key_files.project/models/project_task_type.py: Stage model with mail templates and sequence
key_files.hr_timesheet/models/account_analytic_lin: Timesheet model and task timesheet integration
key_files.hr_timesheet/models/project_task.py: Task planned/remaining hours and timesheet helpers
key_files.sale_timesheet/models/project.py: Project profitability and sales order linkage

crons.project_forecast_scheduler: Forecast scheduling and resource planning (Enterprise). Model: project.forecast, method: _cron_schedule_tasks
crons.project_task_stage_auto_update: Automated stage transitions and rotting task alerts. Model: project.task, method: _cron_auto_update_stage
crons.project_rating_cron: Request customer feedback after task completion. Model: project.task, method: _send_task_rating_mail

security_groups.project.group_project_user: Create/read/update own tasks and projects, read stages/tags, log timesheets
security_groups.project.group_project_manager: Full CRUD on projects, tasks, stages, tags, collaborators, and configuration

record_rules.project_project_visibility_rule: restricts projects based on privacy_visibility and user membership
record_rules.project_task_visibility_rule: restricts tasks based on project visibility and assignment
record_rules.project_task_private_rule: private tasks visible only to followers and assignees
